person_name: Tauriscus, legendary tyrant of Spain defeated by Hercules
person_name_full: Tauriscus, legendary tyrant of Spain defeated by Hercules
notes: Legendary tyrant of Spain defeated by Hercules, described as cruel.

docs.title: BOOK XV
docs.author: Ammianus Marcellinus
docs.excerpt: … hastening to the destruction of those cruel tyrants, Geryon and Tauriscus, one of whom was oppressing the Gauls, and the other Spain, after he had conquered both of them, took to wife some women of noble birth in those countries, and became the father of many children; and that his sons called
